reason_for_decision: The article now gives a complete enough selection framework across mission, geometry, integration, scan behavior, and sustainment to pass under the stricter rubric.
strengths: It treats radar selection as a system-engineering decision rather than a spec-sheet comparison.
The scan-architecture and sustainment sections materially improve practical usefulness.
The brand-led section has been removed, making the article more neutral and review-ready.
summary_assessment: This version passes. It is now decision-oriented, technically grounded, and suitable as a professional planning article.
